title: orthopogon longeracemosus
intro: Orthopogon longeracemosus, also known as Vetiver grass or Khus-khus, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Orthopogon longeracemosus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of fever and digestive issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. It can be prepared as a tea, essential oil, or infusion, and is often used in aromatherapy, skincare products, and traditional medicines.
